comment: Each scene is framed into branded store art. Edit headline/subtitle freely. `source` is relative to tools/screenshots/. `platform` picks output sizes + device frame (android=phone bezel, windows=desktop window). `tab`/`scene` are passed to the capture scripts. `background` is 'dark' (default, calm) or 'gradient'.

scenes.headline: Your circle, end-to-end encrypted
scenes.subtitle: Share photos and moments only with the people you love.

scenes.headline: Stories with real film filters
scenes.subtitle: Capture the day with beautiful, true-to-life looks.

scenes.headline: Group video calls, no servers
scenes.subtitle: Peer-to-peer calls that never touch the cloud.

scenes.headline: Private DMs
scenes.subtitle: Every message encrypted, just between you two.

scenes.headline: Your keys never leave your device
scenes.subtitle: No accounts, no servers, no one in the middle.

scenes.headline: A calm home for your people
scenes.subtitle: No ads. No tracking. Nothing you share ever leaves your circle.

scenes.headline: Your circle on the desktop, encrypted
scenes.subtitle: The same private Haven, now on Windows.

scenes.headline: Private messages, big screen
scenes.subtitle: Pick up the conversation right where you left off.
